calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn To Dismiss Action For Failure To Amend Within The Time Allowed By The Court
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Kate Kamka, Esq. of Severson & Werson, (415-398-3344), for Wells Fargo, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Ms. Kamka submits in open court the Proof of Service to prove that Plaintiff was served with the Order sustaining demurrer with leave to amend. Court accepts the Proof of Service and modifies the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Amend Within The Time Allowed By The Court is GRANTED. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Kate Kamka, Esq. of Severson & Werson, (415-398-3344), for Wells Fargo, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant is entitled to attorney's fees in the amount of $1,375. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
